document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

provisions.text: ICH ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any ICH Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the requirements of the R-1 Zone. (RC-Jul 2/02, E-Aug 17/02)

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any ICH Zone except on lots in existence on

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: the date of adoption (July 2, 2002) of this zone for the following:
content_blocks.text: Single Unit Dwellings Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms in conjunction with a permitted dwelling unit (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Open Space Uses
In any ICH Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the requirements of the R-1 Zone. (RC-Jul 2/02, E-Aug 17/02)
